name: @resonate/desktop
author: Resonate
description: Native desktop shell for the Resonate web experience.

scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:runtime-config && electron-builder --win nsis portable --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare:runtime-config && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:linux: npm run prepare:runtime-config && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --config electron-builder.yml
